scripts.test:all: bun test test/classify-error.test.ts && bun test/e2e-routing.ts && bun test/e2e-help.ts && bun test/e2e.ts
scripts.build:local: cd ../opencode && bun run build --single && rm -f ~/.local/bin/cz-cli && cp dist/czcli-darwin-arm64/bin/czcli ~/.local/bin/cz-cli && codesign --sign - ~/.local/bin/cz-cli
scripts.test:ci: bun run build:local && bun run test:all
